svg.title: Vision vs code gap map
svg.desc: Three phases of the event lifecycle showing what the vision requires versus what the code actually implements, with gap severity indicated

g.text: Social gravity during announcement → deadline
No mechanism for stickers, hashtag talk, or social pull. Join = click a button in DM. Event is invisible in group between announcement and deadline.
Memory surfaces before creation
Code has get_prior_event_memories() and /plan command. But /plan is disconnected from /organize_event. Most users never see it.
Event as living organism (can thrive or perish naturally)
collapse_at field exists but auto-cancel is a cron job, not a visible social signal. Group never sees the event "struggling to live".

svg.text: Phase 2 — event is alive, growing toward deadline

g.text: Event lives in the group chat, visible, growing
All interaction forced into private DM. Group chat only receives bot announcements. The event is socially invisible to the group between announcements.
Hashtags and stickers as social energy markers
hashtags column exists in event_memories only (post-event). No way to attach hashtags or reactions to a forming event. Zero visual energy.
Awareness without pressure (v3 principle)
Materialization messages say "event is gathering momentum!" — still engineered excitement. notify_near_minimum() still exists in scheduler.
Relational constraints (if_joins, unless_joins)
Built correctly. Private DM only. LLM infers from natural language. User confirms before save. This is v3-aligned.
Event state machine + idempotency
Single write path, optimistic concurrency, audit trail. Well-built infrastructure. v3-aligned.
Fragment mosaic (no deadline, LLM only rearranges)
Built correctly per v3 spec. Reflexive prompts, no collection window, lineage door. v3-aligned.
Memory feeds the next event (not an artifact)
Service method exists. But /plan is a separate command, not triggered from /organize_event. Most users never see prior memories before creating an event.
Shared memory makes the group feel it has a history
Mosaic posted to group after event. But it arrives as a single bot message — not as something the group continues to build, react to, or reference.
Personal attendance mirror (private, causally inert)
Built correctly. DM only, simple counts, no scoring. v3-aligned.
